If there be peals of thunder at night and blood-red streaks
of lightning standing erect like rods at day-time, and if there be a
cool breeze blowing from the east, there would soon be rain.

If the sprouts of creepers are turned up towards the sky, birds .
bathe in water or dust, and reptiles or worms are seated on the
tips of grass, there will be an immediate fall of rain.
